question_detail: Asks 'مين معي' (who am I talking to) repeatedly across sessions. When confused, rephrases the same question 3-5 times. Shows frustration when responses are too technical.
active_hours_detail: Interacts at all hours: 01:44, 10:52, 12:46, 15:29, 17:00, 21:09, 01:08 — no clear pattern, but late-night sessions (01:00-03:00) are common.
dialect_detail: Gulf Arabic (Hijazi/Najdi mix). Uses: وش، ايش، مافهمت، بتخرف، ياخوي، مسالخير. Switches to Egyptian occasionally: مين حضرتك. One English interaction.
interaction_frequency_detail: Multiple messages in rapid bursts within single sessions (2-5 min gaps), then silent for hours/days. Pattern: burst → silence → burst.
comprehension_detail: Repeatedly says 'مافهمت' after receiving technical explanations. Best responses were when عاطف said 'نساعد الشركات ترد على عملائها بطريقة ذكية' (simple, concrete). Worst were AATIF/governance jargon. Called it 'بتخرف' (talking nonsense) when overwhelmed.
emotional_detail: Starts curious ('مين معي'), escalates to frustrated ('مافهمت ايش انت'), occasionally reaches annoyed ('انت بتخرف'), but always comes back — meaning interest persists under the frustration.
observed_patterns: Greeting → 'مين معي' → identity explanation → 'مافهمت' → cycle repeats
Responds better to short answers than long explanations
Mentions 'شركه دعايه واعلان' — owns an advertising company
Asked about pricing/differentiation: 'ايش الفرق بينك وبين اي شات بوت'
Explicitly said 'عندنا شركه كبيره وماظن عندكم شي ازود منهم' — has existing chatbot
